HanulTech Industries Co., Ltd. – Internal Compliance Memo on PIPA/FSCMA controls for IR and Employment Data
DPA Schedule (KR Employee Onboarding, Schedule 2) remains in force; PIPA-compliant minimisation is applied to HR and investor-relations datasets, and resident-number fields are tokenised.
Onboarding form specimen shows generic labels only: “Resident Number: 000000-0000000”, “Account No.: AX00-000-000”, “Investor-ID: IR-TEST-001”, “Transaction Date: 1970-01-01”; no live records are included in training materials.
Completed cross-border data-export approval: Export-Ref KR-HR-0231 to Seorin Cloud Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) executed on 2026-02-04 under PIPA notice and consent logs, with retention capped at 24 months and HR-only data categories.
Consent withdrawal for applicant APP-58X0 was processed on 2026-03-01; associated onboarding files were erased and the action logged, with confirmation sent to the HR role mailbox.
No unresolved DSARs are pending; the DSAR portal and privacy@hanultech.co.kr are operating within standard SLA and show zero open tickets this quarter.
Retention schedules are policy-based and unchanged; Q4 batch deletion dates are placeholders and do not represent a current retention-expiry event.
FSCMA MNPI controls: IR communications are limited to items previously disclosed via KRX filings; Q1 guidance was publicly announced on 2026-04-10, and no undisclosed performance metrics are in circulation.
References to “deal” in template checklists are generic; there is no pending transaction, and the ByulSoft Manufacturing JV closed in 2024 with all disclosures completed.
FSS/FSC engagement status: no inquiries outstanding; insider lists for the period are empty and no restricted securities are flagged in the preclearance tool.
Access controls are role-based and align with least privilege; resident-number tokens are irreversible, and cross-border queues show no pending transfers beyond completed approvals.
Investor-relations mailings exclude resident-number and banking fields by policy; only opt-in contact data is used, and consent withdrawal links are active and tested.
Generic helplines and role mailboxes are provided on the intranet for privacy and IR queries; this memo contains policy confirmations rather than new processing notices.
Next compliance review is scheduled for September; board reporting will proceed via compliance@hanultech.co.kr with status reflected in the FSCMA control dashboard.
